ability_3139_Description: You follow the dwarven credo: when things go bad, remember to not die.
ability_3139_SpecialInfo: You recover 50% of your Max Armor, boosted by any effects that increase Major Healing amounts. This ability can only be used when you are wearing four or more pieces of Dwarven Plate Armor.
ability_3140_Description: You are unstoppable, and with a shout, you ignore your opponents' defensive techniques.
ability_3140_SpecialInfo: You gain 100% Stun Evasion and 100% Knockback Evasion for 10 seconds. This ability can only be used when you are wearing four or more pieces of Orcish Plate Armor.

ability_3141_SpecialInfo: This ability can only be used when you are wearing four or more pieces of Gazluk Death Trooper Armor.
ability_3142_Description: With a shout, you move like a whirlwind, dodging and strafing any projectiles.

ability_3143_Description: You shout your fury at an opponent, shaking and bewildering them.

ability_9360_Description: It's a fox. In a box. Summon him up to sell your stocks! A familiar fox created by a powerful wizard and trained in the ways of industry then magically stuffed in a pocket-sized box. The fox will slowly bond to you over time and use allowing better service. Your vendor fox can only be summoned once every 2 hours of in-game time. You must have a wooden box in your inventory to use this ability. (Storage crates work well. The item will not be consumed)

ability_9360_SpecialInfo: Summons a Vendor Fox for 5 minutes.
